authoritySources.title: Development Hub PDX FAQ service categories
authoritySources.evidenceSummary: Public DevHub FAQ identifies permit purchase, fee payment, and inspection scheduling for online trade permits as DevHub service categories.

authoritySources.title: Development Hub PDX application guidance
authoritySources.evidenceSummary: Public DevHub guidance identifies trade permits and trade permits with plan review among permit request types.

authoritySources.title: PP&D fixture-only public source inventory
authoritySources.evidenceSummary: Existing fixture inventory categorizes PP&D permit application, forms, handout, fee, and DevHub guide pages as public sources for deterministic PP&D workflow modeling.

eligibilityFacts.label: Property identifier or site address
eligibilityFacts.reason: The workflow must be tied to a Portland property before an online trade permit purchase can be evaluated or drafted.

eligibilityFacts.label: Trade permit kind
eligibilityFacts.reason: The purchase workflow is scoped to online trade permit categories, not building permits or trade permits that require plan review.

eligibilityFacts.label: Project does not require plan review
eligibilityFacts.reason: The skeleton models online trade permit purchase only; trade permits with plan review must route to the separate plan-review workflow fixture.

eligibilityFacts.label: Applicant role
eligibilityFacts.reason: The agent must know whether owner, contractor, or authorized agent facts and attestations are needed before drafting a purchase workflow.

included: Online purchase path for eligible electrical, mechanical, or plumbing trade permits
Fixture-only eligibility screening before DevHub drafting
Fee review and payment stop point
excluded: Official submission, certification, payment, cancellation, upload, or inspection scheduling without exact session-specific confirmation
CAPTCHA, MFA, account creation, password recovery, or payment entry automation

requiredLicenseOrContractorFacts.label: Contractor business name or owner-attestation path
Contractor license identifier when a contractor is used
Authorization to act for owner or contractor

stages.summary: Use only committed public fixture/source-inventory evidence before modeling the workflow.
Confirm property, trade kind, applicant role, contractor/license facts, and that plan review is not required.
Prepare reversible draft inputs only in mocked or user-approved DevHub contexts; do not purchase, certify, or submit.
Stop before fee payment or payment-detail entry and require exact user confirmation for the financial action.
Stop before scheduling an inspection for an online trade permit and require exact user confirmation.

feePaymentGates.stopMessage: Stop before payment entry or fee payment; require exact session-specific user confirmation.

inspectionSchedulingStopPoints.stopMessage: The agent may summarize inspection scheduling requirements but must stop before scheduling.
